subject: [PATCH v3 2/8] io_uring/kbuf: support kernel-managed buffer rings in buffer selection

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the io_br_sel struct modification, suggesting that it may not be sufficient to simply separate address and value fields. Proposed an alternative approach using a separate flag to indicate kernel-managed buffers.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch series introduces support for kernel-managed buffer rings in io_uring, allowing the kernel to manage buffers instead of relying on user-space allocation. The first patch modifies the io_br_sel struct to separate address and value fields, enabling error checking for kernel addresses. It also adds auto-commit functionality for selected kernel-managed buffers.
